text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: No paper with the exact title "Prophet inequalities and posted pricing mechanisms" by Correa, Korol, and Hoeksma was found in any academic database or via web search. The closest real papers by Correa and Hoeksma involve related topics but carry different titles (e.g., "Posted Price Mechanisms and Optimal Threshold Strategies for Random Arrivals," MOR 2021, with different co-authors), and "Anja Korol" does not appear as a co-author in any related work found.
LINK: NONE
